stage: Rung-4b Stage 1 — compliant-coupling implementation + tuning (the Rung-0/1 re-validation)
purpose: Pre-register the compliant-coupling parameter sweep + selection rule BEFORE the formal gate sweep. The rigid dual-hold weld (20000 N/m, hard-locked axes) over-couples embodiment: a different-bodied xArm6 partner cannot be capability-matched (Rung-4 feasibility wall, spikes/results/cocarry/rung4 — fight 518 N vs matched ~75 N, fails placed+level+unstressed). This slice implements a PASSIVE compliant coupling (a freed-axis spring-damper; Variant A linear, Variant B force-saturated) and tunes it against four binding constraints, selecting the stiffest setting that satisfies all four with margin. If none does, STOP with the honest fallback.

governance.phase: Phase-2 (scope question open; does not block)
governance.only_deliberate_task_change: the dual-hold coupling stiffness/force law (a freed-axis passive spring-damper). Action/obs spaces, success predicate, f_max (130.6 N), 0.10 m radius, bar, goal, geometry are UNCHANGED.
governance.no_grasp_no_learning: passive spring-damper attach only; no gripper-force action, no friction grasp, no new training.
governance.rigid_artifacts_immutable_I8: the committed rigid ladder (rung1..rung4) is NOT edited; this writes only under rung4b/.

coupling_implementation.parameter: make_cocarry_env(drive_stiffness, drive_damping, drive_force_limit) -> chamber.envs.cocarry.cocarry_coupling; rigid default (None) = hard-locked axis (byte-identical to the committed ladder).
coupling_implementation.variant_A: freed axis (wide +-1 m limit) + linear drive at lower stiffness K_c, damping = K_c * 0.1 (the rig's damping ratio, conservatively overdamped), force unbounded. Force = K_c x deflection.
coupling_implementation.variant_B: freed axis + STIFF drive + finite force_limit near f_max (the passive progressive/bilinear knee): near-rigid for the small-force matched pair, force-saturated for a large kinematic mismatch.
coupling_implementation.damping_note: damping scaled with stiffness at the rig ratio keeps the rig's stable, no-blow-up character at every K_c (well above critical c=2*sqrt(K*m_eff) for the ~0.2 kg per-hold effective mass).

binding_constraints.C1: matched Panda pair joint success ~100% with small deflection (matched centroid-to-goal p90 << the 0.10 m radius).
binding_constraints.C2: single-arm positive control ~0 (coupling-validity preserved — softening must NOT let one arm succeed).
binding_constraints.C3: the coupling still binds on matched successes (tilt / stress load-bearing, not slack).
binding_constraints.C4: the xArm6 + Robotiq teammate is ADMITTED — capability calibration vs the cooperative Panda ego clears C_min=0.75 (the fight is cooperatively feasible; success predicate UNCHANGED, incl. the unstressed conjunct at f_max=130.6 N).

selection_rule: Among settings satisfying C1-C4 with margin, choose the STIFFEST (closest to the rigid 20000 N/m) — it is the least task-altering compliant coupling. Commit + tag the chosen setting + the sweep evidence, then proceed to Stage 2.
gate_rule: If no Variant-A setting satisfies C1-C4, escalate to Variant B and repeat. If Variant B also fails, STOP and report the honest fallback (a real finding); do NOT weaken C_min or move the bar/predicate/f_max to force a pass.

sweep_grid.diagnostic: zero-action static-hold wrist-stress baseline (Panda partner vs xArm6 partner) to attribute any C4 failure to a cooperative fight vs an embodiment-dependent proxy.

decision_inputs_fixed_before_sweep: The C1-C4 criteria, f_max (130.6 N), C_min (0.75), the success predicate, and the selection/gate rules are fixed by the Rung-4b design and this pre-registration. The K grid + variant approach were chosen during implementation (development scouting); the binding thresholds were not weakened.
